missing_main_functions: Account Deletion or Cleanup (e.g., handling expired unverified accounts)
Error Handling and Messaging (centralized error response validation)
missing_sub_functions: Verification Link Expiry Handling (e.g., behavior when expired link is clicked, ability to request new link after expiry)
Disposable Email Domain List Update Mechanism (if applicable for testing)
Rate Limit Reset for Account Creation (explicit test for rolling window behavior beyond simple reset)

unclear_categories.reason: The test intent 'Rate Limit Reset After Window' is vague; it should specify whether it tests the exact moment the window expires or a gradual reset. Also, it overlaps with CAT007's rolling window concept.
The test intent 'Unique Link Generation' is unclear on how uniqueness is verified (e.g., across different users, same user re-registration).

recommendations: Add a main function for 'Account Lifecycle Management' covering expired verification links and account cleanup.
Add a sub-function for 'Verification Link Expiry Handling' under FUNC002 to cover expired link scenarios and re-request behavior.
Clarify CAT008 to specify whether it tests the exact 15-minute window boundary or a gradual reset.
Clarify CAT010 to define uniqueness scope (e.g., across all registrations, not just per user).
Consider adding a sub-function for 'Error Message Validation' to ensure all specified error messages are returned correctly.
Add a test category for 'Disposable Email Domain List Accuracy' to ensure the list is up-to-date and blocks known providers.
Include a test category for 'Rate Limit Error Messages' since they are not specified in the requirements but are critical for user feedback.
